intraday.summary: Expect continued selling pressure over next 2 hours as geopolitical tensions escalate with Iran war fears. VIX at 25+ signals institutional hedging, oil shock fears mounting
intraday.key_driver: US-Iran conflict escalation driving risk-off sentiment

next_day.summary: Overnight developments in Middle East likely to drive gap down. G7 emergency oil release insufficient to calm energy markets. Stagflation fears resurging
next_day.key_driver: Oil price shock threatening to reverse rate cut expectations

long_term.summary: Geopolitical risk premium returning to markets. Stagflation narrative gaining traction with oil >$85. Fed may need to pause/reverse dovish pivot
long_term.key_driver: Energy-driven inflation resurgence threatening soft landing narrative

news_impact: Iran war headlines dominating sentiment. G7 oil reserve release being viewed as insufficient. Stagflation fears resurging with oil shock. Tech earnings concerns secondary to macro risks
options_flow_impact: Put/Call ratio at 1.195 showing defensive positioning but not extreme fear yet. Large AAPL and MSFT put trades suggest institutional hedging of tech exposure. Deep ITM puts on MSFT particularly notable
risks: Diplomatic breakthrough with Iran could spark relief rally
Options expiry volatility could exaggerate moves

SPY.analysis: SPY breaking below key support levels. VIX spike to 25+ confirms institutional de-risking. Iran tensions trump any positive earnings momentum

QQQ.analysis: Tech underperforming on rate hike fears if stagflation takes hold. Growth multiples vulnerable to energy shock. NVDA weakness particularly concerning

tickers_to_watch.reason: Small caps most vulnerable to stagflation - higher rates and input costs devastating for margins
AI momentum trade unwinding as macro risks dominate. High multiple most vulnerable to rate fears

trade_ideas.idea: Buy SPY 674/672 put spread expiring tomorrow
trade_ideas.thesis: Overnight gap down likely on Iran developments. Limited risk with defined spread

trade_ideas.idea: Long VIX calls 26 strike for next week
trade_ideas.thesis: VIX likely to spike further on geopolitical uncertainty. Already at 25
